title: Egyptian Sevaiiya Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that brings together the best of Middle Eastern cuisine. This Sevaiiya recipe is a crowd pleaser, perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the Sevaiiya and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the Sevaiiya is heated through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
